response.global_analysis: The audio features Japanese speech (introduction) followed by a musical performance of the song 'Happiness'. The performer (Kobo Kanaeru) introduces the song as a personal favorite. The on-screen text confirms the song title and credits (Lyrics by Aono Teruma/H.U.B., Music by Yuki Toyoda). Since the reference JSON was null for lyrics, I have manually transcribed the Japanese intro and the song lyrics based on the clear audio and visual cues. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio, including logical splits for pauses and breaths.

subtitles.original: アーニャとパフォーマンスしてから
subtitles.english: After performing with Anya,

subtitles.original: 次は こぼはまた一人で歌いたいなと思います
subtitles.english: next, Kobo wants to sing alone once more.

subtitles.original: これから歌うこの曲は 最近こぼが気に入っている曲で
subtitles.english: This next song I'm going to sing is one that I've really liked lately,

subtitles.original: 聴いたら幸せな気持ちになりました
subtitles.english: and it made me feel happy when I heard it.

subtitles.original: 皆さんもこの曲聴いて 幸せを感じてくれたら嬉しいです
subtitles.english: I hope you all can listen to this song and feel that happiness too.

subtitles.original: それでは 次の曲
subtitles.english: Now then, the next song.

subtitles.original: 青野てるまさんの「Happiness」です
subtitles.english: By Aono Teruma, 'Happiness.'

subtitles.original: 君と Happiness どんな時も
subtitles.english: You and Happiness, no matter when,

subtitles.original: ひとりじゃないって信じてるよ
subtitles.english: I believe that I'm not alone.

subtitles.original: 何も言わなくても 感じてるよ The One for Me
subtitles.english: Even if you don't say anything, I can feel it, you're the one for me.

subtitles.original: 「Happiness」 作詞: 青野てるま・H.U.B. / 作曲: 豊田裕喜
subtitles.english: 'Happiness' Lyrics: Aono Teruma, H.U.B. / Music: Yuki Toyoda

subtitles.original: You always make me happy...
subtitles.english: You always make me happy...

subtitles.original: 打ち込んで 眠れなくて
subtitles.english: Caught up in things, unable to sleep,

subtitles.original: 君との写真 見つめている
subtitles.english: I'm staring at photos of us.

subtitles.original: いくつもの笑顔たちに
subtitles.english: By those many smiles,

subtitles.original: 助けられるよ My Life
subtitles.english: my life is saved.

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒だよ 泣いてもいいよ
subtitles.english: We'll always be together, it's okay to cry.

subtitles.original: あの涙を抱きしめてくれた
subtitles.english: You embraced those tears.

subtitles.original: どこにいるの？
subtitles.english: Where are you?

subtitles.original: ここにいるから
subtitles.english: I'm right here,

subtitles.original: すぐに会いたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to see you right away.

subtitles.original: 君と Happiness 君がいれば
subtitles.english: You and Happiness, if you are here,

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だって思えるよ
subtitles.english: I feel like everything will be okay.

subtitles.original: 何も言わなくても
subtitles.english: Even if you don't say anything,

subtitles.original: 感じてるよ The One for Me
subtitles.english: I can feel it, you're the one for me.

subtitles.original: 君と Happiness どんな時も
subtitles.english: You and Happiness, no matter when,

subtitles.original: ひとりじゃないって信じてるよ
subtitles.english: I believe that I'm not alone.

subtitles.original: 涙溢れたって
subtitles.english: Even if tears overflow,

subtitles.original: 歩けるよ Please stay by my side
subtitles.english: I can walk on, please stay by my side.

subtitles.original: 君に出会えてからは
subtitles.english: Since I met you,

subtitles.original: 素直に笑っていられるよ
subtitles.english: I've been able to smile honestly.

subtitles.original: 少しずつ自分のこと
subtitles.english: Little by little, myself...

subtitles.original: 好きになれた For Your Love
subtitles.english: I've come to like, for your love.

subtitles.original: そう今なら ねぇ心から
subtitles.english: Yes, now, from the bottom of my heart,

subtitles.original: わかりあえるって思えるよ
subtitles.english: I feel like we can understand each other.

subtitles.original: 強がらずにありのままで
subtitles.english: Without acting tough, just as I am,

subtitles.original: 見つめてくれた
subtitles.english: you looked at me.

subtitles.original: だから Happiness 君の事を
subtitles.english: So Happiness, about you,

subtitles.original: 今よりもっと知りたくて
subtitles.english: I want to know even more than now.

subtitles.original: どんな言葉よりも
subtitles.english: More than any words,

subtitles.original: 大切な The One for Me
subtitles.english: precious, you're the one for me.

subtitles.original: 私も君に何か
subtitles.english: I also want to do

subtitles.original: できることしたいよ
subtitles.english: something for you.

subtitles.original: いつでも一緒だから
subtitles.english: Because we're always together,

subtitles.original: 守っていけるから
subtitles.english: I can protect you,

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: forever.

subtitles.original: 君と Happiness 君がいれば
subtitles.english: You and Happiness, if you are here,

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だって思えるよ
subtitles.english: I feel like everything will be okay.

subtitles.original: 何も言わなくても
subtitles.english: Even if you don't say anything,

subtitles.original: 感じてるよ The One for Me
subtitles.english: I can feel it, you're the one for me.

subtitles.original: 君と Happiness どんな時も
subtitles.english: You and Happiness, no matter when,

subtitles.original: ひとりじゃないって信じてるよ
subtitles.english: I believe that I'm not alone.

subtitles.original: 涙溢れたって
subtitles.english: Even if tears overflow,

subtitles.original: 歩けるよ Please stay by my side
subtitles.english: I can walk on, please stay by my side.

subtitles.original: 大切な The One for Me
subtitles.english: Precious, the one for me.

subtitles.original: Yeah! Let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Let's go!

subtitles.original: You always make me happy...
subtitles.english: You always make me happy...

subtitles.original: Oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Oh oh oh...

subtitles.original: Smile for me baby...
subtitles.english: Smile for me baby...

subtitles.original: You always make me happy...
subtitles.english: You always make me happy...

subtitles.english: Smile for me baby...
